channel.title: GitHub MDX Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of MDX in GitHub

item.title: chakra-ui/chakra-ui
item.description: ⚡️ Simple, Modular & Accessible UI Components for your React Applications

item.title: dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
item.description: 🐙 Guides, papers, lecture, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering

item.title: newrelic/docs-website
item.description: Source code for @newrelic docs. We welcome pull requests and questions on our docs!

item.title: cloudposse/atmos
item.description: 👽 Terraform Orchestration Tool for DevOps. Keep environment configuration DRY with hierarchical imports of configurations, inheritance, and WAY more. Native support for Terraform and Helmfile.

item.title: yangshun/front-end-interview-handbook
item.description: ⚡️ Front End interview preparation materials for busy engineers

item.title: yewstack/yew
item.description: Rust / Wasm framework for creating reliable and efficient web applications

item.title: ton-community/ton-docs
item.description: User-friendly documentation for newcomers to TON blockchain.

item.title: leerob/leerob.io
item.description: ✨ My portfolio built with Next.js, Tailwind, and Vercel.

item.title: huggingface/deep-rl-class
item.description: This repo contains the syllabus of the Hugging Face Deep Reinforcement Learning Course.
